subcodes.first_line: Unto all peoples have We given, in the Sacred Books of old, the glad-tidings of this blessed Day, and all were waiting; yet when the Sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع امم را در کتب قبل باین یوم مبارک بشارت دادیم و کل هم منتظر مع ذلک چون شمس
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @high station of the true believer, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @prophecy and fulfillment
